ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.title: StarLight
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.descript: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.smartDes: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.title: Sword Aura
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.descript: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.smartDes: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-HALF_LIFE_HEAL_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, heal for the amount shown. The healing is halved each turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-HALF_LIFE_HEAL_POWER.smar: Heal for the amount shown at the start of your turn. Halves each turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MOUSE_SHIELD_POWER.title: Mouse Shield
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MOUSE_SHIELD_POWER.descri: Reduce all HP loss you take by 9. This power does not stack or expire on its own.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MOUSE_SHIELD_POWER.smartD: Reduce all HP loss you take by 9.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MARK_LOCK_POWER.title: Mark
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MARK_LOCK_POWER.descripti: This power can stack, but regardless of its amount, all hits only deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage, including hits fully absorbed by Block. Loses [blue]1[/blue] stack at the end of each enemy turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-MARK_LOCK_POWER.smartDesc: Can stack, but all hits only deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage. Loses [blue]1[/blue] stack each turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EXPOSURE_POWER.title: Exposure
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EXPOSURE_POWER.descriptio: If this enemy is killed by a player who owns a Flashlight relic, that killer gains [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EXPOSURE_POWER.smartDescr: Killed by a Flashlight owner: grant [blue]1[/blue] Eternal Starlight.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-GIANT_ANCHOR_POWER.title: Giant Anchor
ASTRALPARTYMOD-GIANT_ANCHOR_POWER.descri: Each stack gives you [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] stack at the end of your turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-GIANT_ANCHOR_POWER.smartD: Each stack gives you [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] stack at the end of your turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COUNTER_POWER.title: Counter
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COUNTER_POWER.description: When you take unblocked damage, deal that much damage back to the attacker and lose 1 stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COUNTER_POWER.smartDescri: Retaliate for unblocked damage taken, then lose 1 stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-FATE_WEAK_IMPRINT_POWER.d: Take 1 extra damage from all hits, including hits fully absorbed by Block. Does not stack. Refreshes to 2 turns when applied again. If killed while marked, the killer gains 1 [card]Fate Guidance[/card].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-FATE_WEAK_IMPRINT_POWER.s: Take 1 extra damage from all hits. Refreshes to 2 turns when reapplied.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TWIN_SHADOWS_POWER.title: Twin Shadows
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TWIN_SHADOWS_POWER.descri: This shadow makes its owner lose 1 HP at the start of its turn. Lasts 2 turns. Multiple Twin Shadows track separately.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TWIN_SHADOWS_POWER.smartD: Lose 1 HP at the start of your turn. Lasts 2 turns.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SHADOWS_LIMIT_POWER.title: Shadow Quota
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SHADOWS_LIMIT_POWER.descr: Shows how many more times this turn your Attack cards can apply [power]Twin Shadows[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SHADOWS_LIMIT_POWER.smart: Shows how many more times this turn your Attack cards can apply [power]Twin Shadows[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-HUNTERS_FEAST_POWER.title: Hunter's Feast
ASTRALPARTYMOD-HUNTERS_FEAST_POWER.descr: At the end of this combat, permanently increase your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by this amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-HUNTERS_FEAST_POWER.smart: At the end of this combat, permanently increase your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by this amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-DRAGON_AWAKENING_POWER.de: At the end of combat, [relic]Dragon Gate[/relic] reduces its Thunder counter by this amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-DRAGON_AWAKENING_POWER.sm: At the end of combat, [relic]Dragon Gate[/relic] reduces its Thunder counter by this amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TRUE_DRAGON_FORM_POWER.de: Damage +4. Gain 2 [red]Strength[/red], 1 [green]Dexterity[/green], and permanently gain 2 Max HP. Does not stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TRUE_DRAGON_FORM_POWER.sm: Damage +4. Gain 2 [red]Strength[/red], 1 [green]Dexterity[/green], and permanently gain 2 Max HP. Does not stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-DRAGON_ROAR_WARD_POWER.de: Until the enemy turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-DRAGON_ROAR_WARD_POWER.sm: Until the enemy turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CONCEALING_POWER.title: Concealing
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CONCEALING_POWER.descript:
Until your next turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources.
During that time, the first time you deal damage to an enemy, gain [power]Ambush[/power] equal to that enemy's [power]Mark[/power], then remove this power.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CONCEALING_POWER.smartDes: Until your next turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources. The first time you damage an enemy, gain [power]Ambush[/power] equal to its [power]Mark[/power] and remove this power.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-INVESTIGATION_TARGET_POWE:
Does not stack or duplicate.
When a unit with this power is killed, the killer immediately triggers 1 [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event card, and the holder of [relic]Persona: Bonnie[/relic] gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].

Does not stack or duplicate. On kill, the killer immediately triggers 1 [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event card, and the holder of [relic]Persona: Bonnie[/relic] gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-AMBUSH_POWER.title: Ambush
ASTRALPARTYMOD-AMBUSH_POWER.description: Gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] equal to this power's amount. Remove it at the end of your turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-AMBUSH_POWER.smartDescrip: Gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] equal to this amount. Remove it at end of turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-BOUNDARY_REINFORCEMENT_PO: Lasts 2 turns. It does nothing on the turn you gain it. If you take no damage from the time you gain it until your next turn starts, gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red] at the start of that turn. If you take damage during that window, remove this power.
If you avoid all damage until your next turn starts, gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red]; otherwise remove this power.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-IRON_VIRGIN_WARD_POWER.de: Ignore all damage until your next turn starts.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-IRON_VIRGIN_WARD_POWER.sm: Ignore all damage until your next turn starts.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-REVERSED_SCALES_HOLOGRAPH: Each stack reduces HP loss you take by [blue]1[/blue].
Each stack reduces HP loss you take by [blue]1[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-REVERSED_SCALES_POWER.des: Each stack reduces HP loss you take by [blue]2[/blue]. Whenever you gain [blue]1[/blue] stack, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-REVERSED_SCALES_POWER.sma: Each stack reduces HP loss you take by [blue]2[/blue]. Whenever you gain [blue]1[/blue] stack, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ELEGANT_FEATHER_POWER.des: Each stack gives [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Whenever you take unblocked damage, lose [blue]1[/blue] stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ELEGANT_FEATHER_POWER.sma: Each stack gives [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Whenever you take unblocked damage, lose [blue]1[/blue] stack.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAGNANT_COSMOS_POWER.des: Whenever you play an Attack or Skill that actually spends at least {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and it deals damage, spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stagnant Protocol[/gold] to apply [gold]Stagnation[/gold] to the target equal to that card's cost.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAGNANT_COSMOS_POWER.sma: Whenever you play an Attack or Skill that actually spends at least {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and it deals damage, spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stagnant Protocol[/gold] to apply [gold]Stagnation[/gold] to the target equal to that card's cost.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COSMOS_FREEZES_POWER.desc:
This unit's damage is directly reduced using ([blue]1[/blue]-[blue]100[/blue]/([blue]100[/blue]+stacks)), and the icon number shows the current reduction.
When stacks are above [blue]10[/blue], lose [blue]10[/blue]% of the current stacks at end of turn, with a minimum loss of [blue]1[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COSMOS_FREEZES_POWER.smar:
This unit's damage is directly reduced using ([blue]1[/blue]-[blue]100[/blue]/([blue]100[/blue]+stacks)), and the icon number shows the current reduction.
When stacks are above [blue]10[/blue], lose [blue]10[/blue]% of the current stacks at end of turn, with a minimum loss of [blue]1[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-VOID_CRYSTAL_POWER.title: Void Protocol
ASTRALPARTYMOD-VOID_CRYSTAL_POWER.descri: Does not stack or duplicate. After [blue]3[/blue] turns, gain Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-VOID_CRYSTAL_POWER.smartD: Does not stack or duplicate. After [blue]3[/blue] turns, gain Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-I_AM_DRAGON_TEMPORARY_STR: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] this turn. Restore it at end of turn.
Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] this turn. Restore it at end of turn.
